options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -delay_corners
options.description: Restricts the report to the specified delay corners ((delay_corner)+, optional)

options.name: -early
options.description: Only report on the early half of the delay corners

options.name: -exclude_pin_insertion_delay
options.description: Excludes the pin insertion delay

options.name: -exclude_source_latency
options.description: Excludes the source latency

options.name: -file
options.description: Save a copy of the contents of the report to the specified file name

options.name: -from
options.description: List of sources of skew_group to consider for the report. If specified, only paths beginning at one of the sources specified will be reported.

options.name: -histograms
options.description: Displays histograms of key information

options.name: -include_reporting_only_skew_groups
options.description: Additionally include the reporting-only skew groups in the report.

options.name: -include_voltage
options.description: Turns on voltage column

options.name: -late
options.description: Only report on the late half of the delay corners

options.name: -no_invalidate
options.description: Do not invalidate the timing engine.

options.name: -paths
options.description: Number of paths to report on for each timing corner. The default is 1.

options.name: -skew_groups
options.description: Restricts the report to the specified skew groups. By default, all delay-constraining skew groups are displayed.

options.name: -skip_timing_update
options.description: Do not update the timing engine.

options.name: -summarize_stage_depth
options.description: Report by the number of cells of the given tcl list of cell types rather than delay. Possible values are buffer, inverter, logic, clock_gate, generator or *.

options.name: -summary
options.description: Displays just the summary tables

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Return the report as a Tcl value.

options.name: -through
options.description: List of pin objects representing points that all paths reported must pass through. The paths must pass through one of the pins specified.

options.name: -to
options.description: List of pin objects representing all the sinks of skew_groups to consider for the report. If specified, only paths terminating at one of the sinks specified will be reported.

options.name: -views
options.description: Restricts the report to the delay corners associated with the specified views ((analysis_view)+, optional)
